title: Slab Calculator Panel
description: Dashboard panel showing available slabs with dimensions and auto-calculated coverage area.

title: Low Inventory Auto-Alert
description: Automatically notify Darryl via Telegram when any product drops below reorder threshold in Revaly.

title: HubSpot Contact Sync
description: Two-way sync between Drew's contact list and HubSpot CRM to keep leads up to date without manual entry.

title: Weekly Sales Summary Report
description: Automated weekly PDF report covering sales by store, top SKUs, and staff performance sent every Monday morning.

title: Return Rate Insight Panel
description: Panel surfacing return rate trends by category and season. Deferred pending Lightspeed API rate limit review.

title: Invoice Date Bug Fix
description: Fix timezone offset causing invoice dates to display one day behind in the billing dashboard.

title: Personal KPI Dashboard
description: Proposed personal KPI tracking dashboard. Rejected — Mike prefers existing Notion setup and does not want a new interface.

title: Instant Quote Generator
description: Chatbot-driven quote generation flow for common service packages. Client fills short form, agent produces a branded PDF quote automatically.
